B00INCEP01.title: Inception
B00INCEP01.description: A thief who steals corporate secrets through dream-sharing technology is given a chance to erase his past by planting an idea in a target's mind.

B00MATRX02.title: The Matrix
B00MATRX02.description: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulation controlled by machines and joins a rebellion to free humanity.

B00INTER03.title: Interstellar
B00INTER03.description: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole in search of a new home for humanity as Earth becomes uninhabitable.

B00GODFA04.title: The Godfather
B00GODFA04.description: The aging patriarch of an organized crime dynasty transfers control of his empire to his reluctant youngest son.

B00PULPF05.title: Pulp Fiction
B00PULPF05.description: The lives of two mob hitmen, a boxer, and a gangster's wife intertwine in four tales of violence and redemption.

B00SHAWS06.title: The Shawshank Redemption
B00SHAWS06.description: Two imprisoned men bond over several years, finding solace and eventual redemption through acts of common decency.

B00DARKN07.title: The Dark Knight
B00DARKN07.description: Batman faces the Joker, an anarchic criminal mastermind who plunges Gotham City into chaos to prove everyone can be corrupted.

B00FORRE08.title: Forrest Gump
B00FORRE08.description: The extraordinary life journey of a slow-witted but kind-hearted man who unwittingly influences decades of American history.

B00SPIRI09.title: Spirited Away
B00SPIRI09.description: A young girl wanders into a mysterious world of spirits and must work to free herself and her transformed parents.

B00PARAS10.title: Parasite
B00PARAS10.description: A poor family schemes to become employed by a wealthy household, a con that spirals into dark and violent consequences.

B00LALAL11.title: La La Land
B00LALAL11.description: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love while chasing their creative dreams in Los Angeles.

B00MADMX12.title: Mad Max: Fury Road
B00MADMX12.description: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, a woman rebels against a tyrannical warlord with the help of a haunted drifter.

B00GRAND13.title: The Grand Budapest Hotel
B00GRAND13.description: A legendary concierge and his trusted protege become embroiled in the theft of a priceless painting and a family fortune.

B00WHIPL14.title: Whiplash
B00WHIPL14.description: A promising young drummer enrolls at a cutthroat conservatory under a ruthless instructor who will stop at nothing to push him.

B00ARRIV15.title: Arrival
B00ARRIV15.description: A linguist races to communicate with extraterrestrial visitors and decode their language before global tensions boil over.
